title: Senior Fleet Manager at Mahindra Navistar

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Mahindra Navistar
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Mahindra Navistar! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Mahindra Navistar:
Mahindra Navistar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Navistar!
